name: Louisiana Style Potato Wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Spray the foil with vegetable cooking spray.
2. To prepare spice mixture, in a large bowl, combine onion flakes, paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, black pepper and filé powder. Mix well. Add potato wedges to bowl; toss to coat.
3. Arrange potato wedges in a single layer on prepared baking sheet. Bake potatoes, turning once, until golden brown, 20 to 30 minutes. Sprinkle with red pepper sauce if desired.
